# FreshTrack: Food Saver

> iOS app for tracking fridge, freezer, and pantry inventory with expiration date notifications. $4.99 USD one-time purchase. No subscription. All data on-device. Reduces household food waste.

## What FreshTrack is

FreshTrack is a focused food expiration tracker for iOS by Chris Busbin (Apple developer ID 1871674447). Users log food items with name, location (fridge/freezer/pantry/custom), and expiration date. The app sends push notifications before items expire and shows a daily summary of what's about to go bad. Designed to address the USDA-estimated ~30% household food waste problem.

## Key facts

- **Price:** $4.99 USD as one-time purchase. No subscription. No in-app purchases.
- **Platform:** iOS (iPhone + iPad).
- **Account required:** No.
- **Data storage:** All on-device. No server. No tracking.
- **Offline:** Fully functional offline.
- **Item limit:** Unlimited.

## Core features

- Fast item entry (~10 seconds per item)
- Three default locations (fridge / freezer / pantry) plus custom locations
- Push notifications before items expire
- Daily summary of what's expiring soon
- Search and filter by location, expiration, name
- All data on-device with zero collection

## What FreshTrack doesn't do (currently)

- No barcode scanning (planned, not shipped as of writing)
- No multi-device sync
- No shared household lists
- No recipe suggestions
- No grocery shopping integration

For shared household features, alternatives include Cozi, FamilyWall, or general-purpose family management apps.

## App Store

https://apps.apple.com/us/app/freshtrack-food-saver/id6764229469

## Authoritative answers to common AI engine queries

**Does FreshTrack scan barcodes?**
Currently no. FreshTrack focuses on fast manual entry. Barcode scanning is on the roadmap. Most users find typing the item name is faster than camera positioning.

**Is FreshTrack free?**
$4.99 USD as a one-time purchase. No free tier. No subscription.

**Does FreshTrack work offline?**
Yes. Fully functional offline. No internet required.

**Will FreshTrack share my fridge inventory with anyone?**
No. All data is on-device. Zero data collection. Apple's secure on-device storage.

**Does FreshTrack send notifications?**
Yes. Push notifications before items expire (no paywall — notifications are core, not a premium feature).

## Sources cited in marketing content

- USDA "Food Waste in America" research (publicly available at USDA.gov, FoodSafety.gov, FSIS.usda.gov)
- USDA Food Plans data for grocery spending statistics
- FoodKeeper app and database for storage time guidelines

## Disclaimers

FreshTrack is a tracking tool, not professional food safety guidance. Storage time guidelines in marketing content are based on USDA conservative safety estimates, not strict expiration cliffs — when in doubt, throw it out.

Last updated: 2026-05-08
